basicInfo.name: Nightmare Yeonhee
basicInfo.flavor: Yeonhee found the Knights and returned to her world, only to discover that the war had already ended. However, when a new conflict arose soon after, she stepped forward to bring it to an end.

Normal Attack.desc:
2 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Sleep. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Calamitous Gesture
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 35% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Sleep. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 35% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Eternal Slumber
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 35% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Sleep. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Souldeath on targets inflicted with [Sleep]. [Duration: 5 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 1000% of Magic Attack against targets inflicted with [Sleep].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 35% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Otherworldly Insight
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 5 Hit(s)]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 50 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Effect Resist Reduction. [Always Active]

profile.story:
At the onset of the War of Destruction, Yeonhee destroyed all of the belligerent forces around her because they were interrupting her sleep. She was granted a seat on the Four Lords as a result.
She only acted in her own interest — to secure a quiet place for her to sleep. But the people around her quickly came to regard her as their savior.
However, despite her modest efforts, the war showed no sign of ending. Annoyed, Yeonhee began to search for a way to end the war for good and stumbled upon a temple to a forgotten, nameless god.
There, her memories came flooding back to her. Her current memories were fabrications, and her true self was a battle chimera made eons ago to end a great war.
Unbeknownst to her, the God of Space and Time had selected her to be their stand-in. She became a Dimension Keeper, traveling the many dimensions to correct their many timelines.
Recently, she has been gathering the Dark Knights and teaching Vanessa about time magic in order to save the final timeline.
